cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out where Claire ends up with her present after all these swaps. Hmm, there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me list their starting presents again to make sure I have it right. - Alice: brown - Bob: orange ball - Claire: green - Dave: blue - Eve: white Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each swap step by step and track who has what after each one. Maybe I can make a table or just keep track in my head. Let me try writing it down mentally. First swap: Eve and Bob swap. So Eve originally has white, Bob has orange. After swapping, Eve has the orange ball, and Bob has the white present. Let me note that. After first swap: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: green - Dave: blue - Eve: orange Second swap: Eve and Claire swap. Eve has orange,
